name: Customer Support & Member Experience
description: Support channels, FAQ, cancellation process, onboarding emails, refund policy, and member retention touchpoints — nothing exists yet.

actions.task: Confirm Everfit enterprise cancellation flow — Scott to investigate and document (legal requirement)
Select and set up helpdesk — Freshdesk (free tier) or Help Scout
Set up dedicated support email address (support@ or hello@)
Write FAQ — 15-20 questions in Kym's voice; live on website before launch
Create response templates for 10 most common queries
Define refund policy — clear, compliant with AU/US/UK law (coordinate with Sprintlaw WS03)
Build 7-day onboarding email sequence (Day 0 welcome through Day 7 trial ending)
Write winback email for cancelled subscribers (single email, 30 days post-cancel)
Build monthly content update email template for post-launch

ideas: Poor support directly drives churn and negative word-of-mouth — this is a retention tool
Freshdesk free tier is recommended — tickets tracked, templated responses, nothing gets lost
Any complaint or refund request — Kym reviews personally at launch
